data.title: Convergence Networks Acquires Certinet Systems, Expanding Pacific Northwest Presence and Strengthening Security Capabilities in Regulated Industries
data.description: In Yakima, Washington and Portland, Oregon, on March 25, 2026, Convergence Networks, a top Managed Service Provider in North America, revealed the acquisition of Certinet Systems, an IT services company based in Yakima. Certinet Systems is recognized for its excellent customer connections. This acquisition marks a significant move that combines the strengths of both companies and increases Convergence Networks' reach in the market.

data.title: Noah Reports Q4 and Full Year 2025 Earnings: Structural Transformation Driving Significant Improvement in Profitability as AI Integration Drives Operational Efficiency
data.description: In the fourth quarter, there was a notable 12.5% increase in net revenues compared to the previous year, and a significant sequential growth of 15.9%. This growth was mainly propelled by the expansion of global asset allocation and investment capabilities. The profitability structure saw a substantial improvement, with income from operations rising by an impressive 87.3% year-over-year during the period.

data.title: Tether introduces BitNet LoRA, allowing AI training on smartphones with 78% less VRAM usage than standard models. (Learn more)
data.description: Tether has introduced the BitNet LoRA framework which allows for the fine-tuning of AI models on consumer devices. This new technology reduces VRAM usage significantly, with reductions of up to 78% compared to conventional models. This innovation paves the way for more efficient and streamlined AI processes on personal devices, offering a significant improvement in performance.

data.title: Guidepost Solutions Strengthens Protective Services Practice with Appointment of Security Executive Caben Chester
data.description: Guidepost Solutions, a renowned company in investigations, compliance, monitoring, and consulting services, has appointed Caben Chester as the new vice president of Protective Services. With over 20 years of experience in federal intelligence, risk management, and corporate security, Chester will be a valuable addition to the firm. This appointment comes as Guidepost Solutions continues to grow and enhance its Protective Services division.

data.title: RHT Alliance Unites Industry Leaders to Help Rural Providers turn RHTP Funding into Lasting Transformation
data.description: The Rural Health Transformation (RHT) Alliance was recently introduced by GHC Industries in Cleveland on March 25, 2026. This innovative alliance integrates grant strategy, healthcare technology, clinical workflows, and implementation support into a unified model. This end-to-end approach aims to address rural health challenges comprehensively. The launch of the RHT Alliance marks a significant step towards improving healthcare access and outcomes in rural areas.

data.title: Bria Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 25, 2026, Bria.ai has proudly been recognized among industry giants such as Google, Nvidia, Adidas, Walmart, and others. This accolade comes as Bria.ai, the Visual Generative AI Platform catering to developers and production studios, secures a spot on Fast Company's renowned list of the World's Most Innovative. This achievement solidifies Bria's position in the tech sphere alongside these esteemed companies.

data.title: In HelloNation, Landscaping Expert Michael Tarleton Shares Overseeding Strategies in Glen Rock
data.description: In Glen Rock, New Jersey, meticulous timing, careful selection of grass seed, and effective fertilization practices have been noted to significantly enhance turf density in local lawns. Residents are advised to consider the optimal time for overseeding their lawns, alongside implementing key measures to achieve favorable outcomes. By adhering to these guidelines, individuals can substantially improve the overall health and vigor of their lawns in North Jersey.

data.title: Backroads Reports More Than 10% Growth in Active Travel to US National Parks Ahead of the Country's 250th Anniversary
data.description: The trend of multigenerational family travel is driving an increased demand for adventures in US national parks. Backroads, a renowned active travel company based in Berkeley, California, revealed on March 25, 2026, that they have observed ongoing growth in travel to the national parks in the United States. This surge in interest comes as the nation gears up to commemorate its 250th anniversary.

data.title: YBI Engine Tech Incubator Welcomes Heroes Made as Newest Portfolio Company
data.description: In Youngstown, Ohio on March 25, 2026, the YBI Engine Tech Incubator, part of YBI, revealed Heroes Made as its latest addition to the portfolio. This platform offers educators a classroom-friendly tool to enhance character education, communication abilities, and student development.
